item.title:
The agentic economy could be larger than the human economy.
We're building the infrastructure for ...
item.description:
The agentic economy could be larger than the human economy.
We're building the infrastructure for both at Coinbase. https://t.co/UsJ80MEMUI
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 42 | 🔁 6 | 💬 13 | 👁 5147
item.author: @coinbase

item.title:
Codex can learn from experience and proactively suggest things it can do for you.
It now has an in-...
item.description:
Codex can learn from experience and proactively suggest things it can do for you.
It now has an in-app browser, many new plugins, and so much more.
--- @sama | ❤️ 145 | 🔁 3 | 💬 20 | 👁 9365
item.author: @sama

item.title:
Lots of major improvements to Codex!
Computer use is a real update for me; it feels even more usefu...
item.description:
Lots of major improvements to Codex!
Computer use is a real update for me; it feels even more useful than I expected. It can use all of the apps on your Mac, in parallel and without interfering with your direct work.
--- @sama | ❤️ 634 | 🔁 28 | 💬 153 | 👁 17261
item.author: @sama

item.description:

item.title: Had a great time at PyCon & PyData DE. Highly recommend it. Great open-source, community-foc...
item.description:
Had a great time at PyCon &amp; PyData DE. Highly recommend it. Great open-source, community-focused conference with lots of builders in the Python AI, LLM and agent space.
Taking a short family break, my first "vacation" in years (hopefully, I won't miss the DeepSeek V4 drop 🤞😆) https://t.co/kbKtRZK9aa
--- @rasbt | ❤️ 25 | 🔁 4 | 💬 4 | 👁 1167
item.author: @rasbt
